response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and leadership in open-source and team training — all aligned with engineering productivity — but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise, which are key for this role.
strengths: Proven track record in building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators) with hands-on coding.
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and team mentoring.
Broad cross-platform experience including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and infrastructure tooling (Kubernetes, Docker).
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management experience beyond technical mentorship.
Lacks explicit experience leading organizational change or managing engineering teams at scale.
Mobile platform expertise is incidental (iOS app maintenance), not strategic or ecosystem-wide.
